title: Halloween TP
description: This is a Halloween themed GUI texture pack
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f36a4b1abc4889c768079268eeeaf1c8071fb7bd.png)

### **This is a Halloween themed GUI texture pack**
  it changes the hotbar to pumpkins and in general the GUI is now in a purple/orange theme.
  If you can't visualize what I mean you can check out the Images I provided ^^
  I hope you have fun with the texture pack


### Looks!
![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SNjnpecS/images/7443510226da6c81135fa231ce4c23113994690c.png)
![Server list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SNjnpecS/images/ea23b39e531fe626e45bb3c4076342e142808714.png)

### And happy Halloween and spooky season
